emails.body:
James,

Saw the announcement for the Navy hockey alumni game next month. You thinking about lacing them up again? My knees are telling me to stick to coaching my kid's U12 team, but the old crew is trying to get a decent turnout.

Sarah and the kids are doing great. Youngest just started kindergarten, so the house is actually quiet during the day for the first time in years.

Let me know if you're in. I'll send the roster link once it's finalized.

Stix

Stix,

Good to hear from you. Kindergarten milestone — enjoy the quiet while it lasts. Mine are 14 and 11 now, so the house is loud in totally different ways. Mostly arguments about screen time and who ate the last granola bar.

Re: the alumni game — tempting, but I'm pretty sure my ACL would file a formal protest. I'll be there in the stands with a coffee, though. Send the link anyway; maybe I can talk a few other guys into showing up.

Give Sarah my best.

James

Stix,

Security office here — we monitor the alumni distro for OPSEC. Someone forwarded the rink photo from the '08 championship team. Brought back memories. That penalty box door still had the dent from when Lt. Cdr. Reyes tried to "subtle" check the ref.

Enjoy the reunion planning.

JIAITF Security

Security,

Ha — Reyes and that door. Some things never change. Pretty sure the dent is still there, or they've framed it by now.

James — roster link going out Friday. Hope to see you in the stands. Bring the 14-year-old; we're always short on bench managers who actually know the rules.

Stix
